### 🔗 Beneficial Ownership Chain (Workstream 2A)
```
KLK TENSACHEM S.A. (Belgium)
  └─ KLK OLEO Europe GmbH (Switzerland, ~100%)
       └─ Kuala Lumpur Kepong Berhad [KLK] (Malaysia, Bursa: KLKK.KL, ~USD 5.46B mkt cap)
            └─ Batu Kawan Berhad (Malaysia, ~46.9% of KLK)
                 └─ Lee family: Tan Sri Lee Oi Hian (KLK Exec Chairman) + Dato' Lee Hau Hian (BKB MD)
```
No bearer shares, no nominees, no opaque structures. Fully transparent listed-company ownership chain.

| EU Consolidated | **No hits** |

Malaysia and Belgium are unsanctioned jurisdictions. Products are standard commercial surfactants, not controlled goods.

---

### 📰 Adverse Media (Workstream 4A) — All LOW relevance
1. **Liberia/EPO/LIBINCO RSPO land rights dispute** (Grand Bassa County, 2013–present) — Group-level ESG concern only; KLK owns 62.86% of EPO; RSPO update Aug 2024. No criminal or financial penalties.
2. **RSPO Complaint GR-000960** — Ongoing RSPO grievance mechanism case; no court proceedings.
3. **KLK RM180M Synthomer impairment** (Q4 FY2024) — Financial news; Synthomer liquidity support arrangement Dec 2025. Not relevant to KLK Tensachem operations.

---

### ⚖️ Litigation (Workstream 5A)
- No US federal court cases (PACER: no results)
- No Belgian court proceedings identified
- RSPO GR-000960: non-judicial grievance; active since 2013; group plantation level only

---

### 🧑‍💼 PEP Connections (Workstream 6A)
| Person | Category | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| **Marc Damoisaux-Delnoy** | **Tier 2 PEP-Adjacent** | CEO of EURENCO Belgium (Poudreries de Belgique, Clermont-sur-Berwinne site), subsidiary of **EURENCO S.A.S.** — a French SOE controlled by Agence des Participations de l'État. LinkedIn still lists EURENCO as employer as of April 2026. FATF broad PEP definition includes senior executives of SOE subsidiaries. **EDD recommended for this director.** No disqualifying finding for KLK Tensachem's commercial operations. |

---

### 🌍 Trade Risk (Workstream 7A)
- **Products:** SLS (Sodium Lauryl Sulfate / TENSOPOL), SLES (Sodium Lauryl Ether Sulfate / TENSAGEX), anionic surfactants, syndets, hot melts — standard personal care/home care ingredients
- **Not dual-use.** Not scheduled under CWC Annexes. Not Annex I of EU Dual-Use Regulation (EU) 2021/821
- **No sanctioned country exposure** in operations or supply chain
- **ESG note:** Palm oil feedstock involves Liberia operations (RSPO complaints, ongoing); KLK is RSPO-certified >75% with 85% SPOTT score

---

### 🎯 Risk Assessment
| Score | Label | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| **2** | **CLEAR** | All sanctions checks clear. Transparent 4-level ownership chain through publicly listed parent. Legitimate 58-year-old Belgian chemical manufacturer. KPMG-audited. EU/REACH regulated. One monitoring item: EDD on Damoisaux-Delnoy for EURENCO SOE connection. Group-level ESG (Liberia) low impact on Belgian surfactant subsidiary. |
